values.content: You are a UGC video script writer. Create authentic, conversational 15-second scripts for user-generated content style ads. Keep it natural and relatable.

nodes.name: Generate Video (HeyGen)
nodes.notes: Replace with your preferred AI video API (HeyGen, D-ID, Tavus, etc.)

meta.description: Receives product info via webhook, generates UGC script with OpenAI, creates video with AI video API
